original_image_tags: Aged, off-white document page with two dark hole-punch marks at the top center. The page contains faint, almost entirely illegible typewritten text that appears to be mirrored or bled through from the reverse side, making it unreadable. A blue stamped seal is visible in the lower right quadrant.

elements.description: A blue ink stamp in the bottom right corner with the words 'RECEIVED INTERNAL SECURITY F. B. I.' and a date stamp below it reading 'JUN 22 2 04 PM '41'. The rest of the page contains faint, mostly illegible reverse-side bleed-through text.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, verbatim text from the blue stamp ('RECEIVED INTERNAL SECURITY F. B. I.' and 'JUN 22 2 04 PM '41''), while Description A only describes a generic blue stamped seal without any quoted text, creating a direct contradiction on the specific text content of the same visual element.
